title: Smart Choice Dog Toy Dental Chew Toy 2 Pack Runner Boomerang and Ring, Lightweight and Helps Maintain Dental Hygiene
features: PREMIUM MATERIAL & SAFE: Introducing the Smart Choice Rubber Dog Chew Toys - a dynamic rubber toy set designed to keep your furry friend entertained while promoting their dental health.
FLOATABLE: This set includes two engaging toys: a boomerang measuring 24cm x 12cm and a ring with a diameter of 17cm, both crafted from durable thermoplastic rubber and foam.
IMPROVES DENTAL HEALTH: Not only do these toys provide endless fun, but they also help strengthen your dog's jaw and promote healthy teeth and gums by reducing plaque and tartar build-up.
FOR SMALL&MEDIUM CHEWERS: Each toy features an internal squeaker that adds an extra layer of excitement, encouraging your dog to chew and play for hours.
Give your pet the gift of playtime and health with the Smart Choice Rubber Dog Chew Toys, where fun meets functionality! Add an element of surprise to each play session.
description: Smart Choice Rubber Dog Chew Toys - Rubber Toy Set Introducing the Smart Choice Rubber Dog Chew Toys - a dynamic rubber toy set designed to keep your furry friend entertained while promoting their dental health. This set includes two engaging toys: a boomerang measuring 24cm x 12cm and a ring with a diameter of 17cm, both crafted from durable thermoplastic rubber and foam. Each toy features an internal squeaker that adds an extra layer of excitement, encouraging your dog to chew and play for hours. Not only do these toys provide endless fun, but they also help strengthen your dog's jaw and promote healthy teeth and gums by reducing plaque and tartar build-up. Give your pet the gift of playtime and health with the Smart Choice Rubber Dog Chew Toys, where fun meets functionality!
